MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF TDWJ LLCS MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 58814769) FILED BY DEFENDANT AINSWORTH, PATRICK B. THOMAS, MARY C.

LAW AND MOTION 302: PLAINTIFF TDWJ, LLC'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS DENIED. CCP 664.6 IS INAPPLICABLE. CCP 664.6 PROVIDES FOR ENFORCEMENT OF SETTLEMENT OF "PENDING LITIGATION." (KIRBY V. SOUTHERN CALIF. EDISON CO. (2000) 78 CAL.APP.4TH 840, 845 (RELEASE EXECUTED PRIOR TO SUIT COULD NOT BE ENFORCED UNDER CCP 664.6); HOUSING GROUP V. UNITED NAT'L INS. CO. (2001) 90 CAL.APP.4TH 1106, 1108 (ABSENT PENDING LITIGATION, PARTIES CANNOT STIPULATE THAT SETTLEMENT REACHED IN ADR CAN BE ENTERED AS A COURT JUDGMENT PER CCP 664.6). HERE, THE PARTIES EXECUTED THE SETTLEMENT IN APRIL OF 2015 AND PLAINTIFF SUBSEQUENTLY FILED THIS CASE IN DECEMBER OF 2015. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT TRACKS THE TENTATIVE RULING VERBATIM AND COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Tdwj, Llcs To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TDWJ, LLC's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is denied. CCP 664.6 is inapplicable. CCP 664.6 provides for enforcement of settlement of "pending litigation." (Kirby v. Southern Calif. Edison Co. (2000) 78 Cal.App.4th 840, 845 (release executed prior to suit could not be enforced under CCP 664.6); Housing Group v. United Nat'l Ins. Co. (2001) 90 Cal.App.4th 1106, 1108 (absent pending litigation, parties cannot stipulate that settlement reached in ADR can be entered as a court judgment per CCP 664.6). Here, the parties executed the settlement in April of 2015 and plaintiff subsequently filed this case in December of 2015. The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
